seoTitle: Eurongilly vs Eurunderee — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Eurongilly and Eurunderee. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Eurongilly and Eurunderee.
heading: Eurongilly vs Eurunderee — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Eurongilly, New South Wales and Eurunderee, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Eurongilly and Eurunderee have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Eurongilly or Eurunderee safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Eurongilly has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Eurunderee scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Eurongilly scores 30/100 for bushfire risk. Eurunderee scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Eurongilly or Eurunderee?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Eurongilly has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
